transcription.text: At Honda, we believe in the power of dreams. Only dreams can turn a pursuit into a mission. Passion into positive energy. And teamwork into a work of art. Because once you have a dream, there's no telling how far you can go. That's why Honda is proudly supporting Team USA's Olympic and Paralympic teams. For more information, visit www.honda.com

metadata.title: 2026 Honda Olympics: The Power of Dreams: Pursuit
